narrative:
Rockland West (precinct in Washington County) has 933 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.9 percentage points.
